basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) has officially announced the Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published on the official website of Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar. Candidates who hold a Ph.D. (thesis submitted or degree awarded) with a minimum 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onward and 55% or equivalent grade in Class 10th and 12th can now submit their online applications until 15 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

qualification.details: Ph.D. (thesis submitted or degree awarded). Minimum 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onward. Minimum 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th. Desirable: Ph.D. degree awarded with experience in materials modeling in the domain of glasses.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Post Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Post Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar is 15th May 2026. Ensure all your details are submitted correctly before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Post Doctoral Fellow role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Ph.D. (thesis submitted or degree awarded) with a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards and 55% in 10th and 12th grades. Experience in materials modeling is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Post Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 72,000/-, which includes House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Post Doctoral Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Post Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the Post Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar must be submitted online.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this Post Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The Post Doctoral Fellow position is a contract-based role.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Gandhinagar located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar is located in Gandhinagar, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q9. What is the minimum percentage required from Graduation onwards?
faq.answer: A minimum of 60% or an equivalent grade from Graduation onwards is required for this position.

faq.question: Q10. What is the desirable qualification for the Post Doctoral Fellow role?
faq.answer: Desirably, candidates should have a Ph.D. degree awarded along with experience in materials modeling within the domain of glasses.
